RequirementDescription: Sentinel dosing hold shall be enforced.
Cohort enrollment cap shall be enforced.
Next cohort shall be gated on SRC escalation approval.
Correct dose level shall be assigned per active cohort.
Dispensed kit shall match the allocated treatment.
Correct kit type shall be dispensed per visit.
Dispensing shall respect visit-window rules.
Dispensing shall reconcile to dosing.
Screening numbers shall be unique.
Screen-failures shall not be randomizable.
Re-screening shall be permitted per protocol.
Study enrollment cap shall be enforced.
IRT and EDC participant lists shall reconcile.
Randomization data shall transfer to biostatistics.
Enrollment notification shall be delivered.
Low-stock alert shall be delivered.
IRT allocation shall match the approved randomization schedule.
Allocation shall respect entered stratification factors.
Allocation shall preserve permuted-block balance.
Each randomization number shall be unique.
Allocation shall be reproducible from the frozen list.
Treatment shall be concealed until dosing.
Resupply shall trigger at the stock threshold.
Expired kits shall not be dispensable.
Temperature-excursion kits shall be quarantined.
Inventory shall reconcile to physical count.
Kit-return / reconciliation at study close shall be supported.
Emergency unblinding shall record an audit trail.
Unblinding shall enforce role permissions.
Safety shall be notified after an unblind.
